creator: pavelivolkov@googlemail.com
text:
Hello.
It's my new email.
Approved.
Thank.

On Thu, Jan 23, 2014 at 10:00 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/ssgless,
>
> Please note that PR ports/186041 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/186041
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
